title: Challenge
description: A dispute raised by a validator against a claim, requiring evidence and resolution.

challengerId.description: The validator who raised this challenge.

reason.description: Why this claim is being disputed — must be substantive.

evidence.description: Supporting evidence or references for the challenge.

status.description: Current resolution state of the challenge.

resolvedBy.description: The validator or admin who resolved this challenge.

resolutionNote.description: Explanation of how/why the challenge was resolved.
